changeSet.author: baris.ozturkmen
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS hearing_idx_1 ON hearing (allocated, unscheduled, is_vacated_trial, type_id, jurisdiction_type);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS hearing_idx_2 ON hearing (court_centre_id, court_room_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS hearing_idx_3 ON hearing (start_date, end_date);
